Add an oversized shirt and heeled boots for a chic everyday look - Fit : TANYA is a pair of skinny fit jeans with a narrow fit leg opening - Pockets : - - Back pocket - - Coin pocket - - Front pocket - Fit : Skinny Fit 🛒 kauf es hier!
